授業の概要・背景:
Basic Outline is...

Week 1: Intro, Signing Up Online, Examples of Past Classwork (0%)

Weeks 2, 3, 4: Classwork. Type ideas in a Google Document, Upload it. (18%)

Week 5: Speaking Quiz and Example Script for a Presentation. (7%)

Weeks 6, 7, 8: Classwork. Type ideas in a Google Document, Upload it. (18%)

Week 9: Speaking Quiz and Script Writing for a Presentation. (7%)

Weeks 10, 11, 12: Classwork. Type ideas in a Google Document, Upload it. (18%)

Week 13: Speaking Quiz and Presentation Rehearsal (7%)

Week 14: Presentation and Peer Reviews. (25%)
授業方法: Classes will be taught face to face with possible on demand due to emergency situations.Students will need a Gmail account to access Google Classroom.IMPORTANT: You must have space in your Google Drive. If your Google Drive is full (15GB) of photos, videos, or other documents, you will not be able to see class material or assignments.

教科書/Required texts0: Materials will be available on Google Classroom in a pdf file.  You are advised to either A) print out the materials and handwrite notes in class or B) use a device and a pencil to take notes.  Other worksheets will be in either Word/Google Doc and can be completed by typing.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: To be conducted during the last week of class.

各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
